title: non-record:10Layer + BigramHash+ SWA + Attention-Residuals
author: AtomChen0425
body:
Mixed Int5/Int6 Quantization: I compressed the MLP weights to 5-bit (Int5). I used this extra space to add a 10th transformer layer. I kept the attention weights at 6-bit (Int6) to maintain precision.

Expanded BigramHash: I increased the BigramHash to 10,240 buckets. This reduces hash collisions for consecutive token pairs. 

High-Quality SWA: I used a highly selective Stochastic Weight Averaging (SWA) strategy.

Attention-Residuals:  I removed standard layer-by-layer residuals. Instead, the model keeps a rolling history of previous layer outputs. It uses a learned query to calculate a Softmax-weighted score over this history.

## Result
Seed|val_bpb | Size
--|--|--
1337|1.2767|15858193 bytes
